channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 16%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘I’m not walking away,’ says Starmer despite defence secretary’s exit
item.description: ‘I’m not walking away,’ says Starmer despite defence secretary’s exit

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer braced for wave of resignations as confident Burnham readies top team
item.description: Starmer braced for wave of resignations as confident Burnham readies top team

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer defends investment on defence as he vows to fight any leadership challenge – as it happened
item.description: Starmer defends investment on defence as he vows to fight any leadership challenge – as it happened

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Who is Dan Jarvis, the new defence secretary replacing John Healey?
item.description: Who is Dan Jarvis, the new defence secretary replacing John Healey?

item.title: i Politics: Morgan McSweeney is already back advising Keir Starmer
item.description: Morgan McSweeney is already back advising Keir Starmer

item.title: FT UK Politics: Personal resentments loom over Burnham’s showdown with Starmer
item.description: Personal resentments loom over Burnham’s showdown with Starmer

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: It’s fascinating how the deadenders will proudly go “look, you fool, we’ve been in power for two years and not a single Cabinet minister could possibly be expected to actually adjudicate between the Treasury and the M...
item.description: It’s fascinating how the deadenders will proudly go “look, you fool, we’ve been in power for two years and not a single Cabinet minister could possibly be expected to actually adjudicate between the Treasury and the M...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: US urges Starmer to boost UK military strength with ‘urgency’
item.description: US urges Starmer to boost UK military strength with ‘urgency’

item.title: BBC Politics: I have a duty to stay on, says PM as he justifies defence spending decisions
item.description: I have a duty to stay on, says PM as he justifies defence spending decisions

item.title: BBC Politics: Who's in Keir Starmer's cabinet?
